items.title: Charlie Kirk’s ‘mentor’ and father figure of modern cheerleading dies after falling while playing pickleball: report
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer actor Nicholas Brendon dies aged 54
items.dek: Brendon died of "natural cases", his family said in a statement, remembering him as "passionate" and "sensitive".
items.body: Brendon died of "natural cases", his family said in a statement, remembering him as "passionate" and "sensitive".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Watch: Thick smoke billows from South Korea car parts plant in deadly fire
items.dek: At least 10 people were killed and dozens injured when a huge blaze engulfed a car parts factory in the central city of Daejeon.
items.body: At least 10 people were killed and dozens injured when a huge blaze engulfed a car parts factory in the central city of Daejeon.
items.author: IriLine Desk
